title: Software Engineer
description:
votre rôle

Your Role:

Within a project team operating in a collaborative and Agile Scrum or Kanban mode, you will be the business intelligence designer/developer, working in coordination with the Product Owner, Scrum Master, Software Analysts, Technical Lead, and other developers.

In this Agile context, you will perform various tasks, including:

Estimating the development effort for User Stories.

Defining detailed specifications based on User Stories.

Designing and developing according to established software architecture.

Conducting unit and 2-to-2 integration testing.

Developing associated testing tools.

Automating and industrializing routine operations (build processes, testing, code quality audits, code containerization, etc.).

Preparing delivery packages (DevOps mode).

You will also provide technical support and perform corrective and adaptive maintenance for delivered elements.

votre profil

Your Profile:

With a minimum of a BAC+5 education, such as an engineering school or equivalent, you have at least 5 years of experience in development within the business intelligence field.

Technical Skills:

Systems: Linux, Unix, Windows

Databases: MongoDB, Oracle, PostgreSQL, SQL Server

Languages: SQL, PL/SQL

Cloud & Container: Docker

Deployment: Ansible, Jenkins

Monitoring: Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana

Big Data: Spark/Scala, Hadoop

Professional Skills:

Passion for software development using modern methods and tools

Interest in Agile/DevOps practices

A preference for working in multidisciplinary teams

Pedagogical skills and a willingness to collaborate

Curiosity, a taste for challenges and innovation, and a proactive approach

Pragmatism, autonomy, and strong organizational skills

In the international environment of Orange Business Services, a high level of proficiency in both written and spoken French and English is required.

le plus de l'offre

You embrace the values of agility and have a mastery of agile and collaborative management tools such as Jira/Confluence.

You can present a disruptive solution, provide reasoning, and persuade.

You have a strong inclination for teamwork and excellent interpersonal skills.

You are skilled at listening to the client and its users, translating their needs into requirements or proposed solutions through suitable software architecture.

Your knowledge in the field of networks and telecommunications will be highly appreciated.

contrat

CDI
